system.flavor: You throw a gleaming stone of condensed pure poison. On impact, it blossoms into a beautiful, shimmering, and very deadly cloud.
system.effect:
Summon one or (5+) two choking clouds in range.

[Choking Cloud — Summon (4)]
Summon Effect cloud is an obscured space. In addition, characters other than you standing in or adjacent to a cloud do not clear statuses at the end of their turn.
Summon Effect foes treat the area as difficult and dangerous terrain.
Summon Action cloud flies 2 spaces. It can enter or end this movement in a character's spaces.
